review_findings.finding: Stage 7 had no whole-stage review gate or evidence after Phase 7.1/7.2/7.3 candidate pass.
review_findings.fix: Added STAGE7_WHOLE_STAGE_REVIEW.md, whole_stage_review evidence pack, terminal log, changed files, risk/rollback, and contract test.
review_findings.verification: test_v024_stage7_whole_review_contract.py covers artifacts, bounded scope, phase consistency, stop conditions, findings, and non-upload gate.

review_findings.finding: Top-level status files still described Stage 7 Phase 7.3 as the current run after the stage became ready for whole-stage review.
review_findings.fix: Updated README, HANDOFF, RUN_CONTRACT, STAGE7_REPORT_ANALYSIS, CHANGELOG, and the three baseline status files to record whole-stage review status and next GitHub upload gate.
review_findings.verification: Stage 7 whole review contract reads the whole_stage_review evidence and phase inputs; final diff/status checks confirm bounded PFI-only changes.

review_findings.finding: Stage 7 lacked one consolidated command/evidence surface tying report schema, page display, browser screenshot, stop-condition audit, and no-data-mutation boundary together before upload.
review_findings.fix: Added whole_stage_review/evidence.json with reviewed phase IDs, acceptance checks, validation surface, stop-condition audit, commands, remaining gates, and explicit non-goals.
review_findings.verification: json evidence checks, target whole review pytest, phase regressions, Phase 7.3 browser validation, Stage 6 adjacent regression, node checks, screenshot size check, and git diff check are recorded as pass.
